generated_oml:
@prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.org/dt/vocab# .

// ---------- Physical Sensing Components ----------
instance PhotometricSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Photometric sensor measuring light levels for occupancy and daylight analysis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PhotometricDataStream
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor measuring ambient temperature inside the building"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataStream
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Humidity sensor measuring relative humidity"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataStream
]

instance MotionDetector : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motion detector for occupancy sensing"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotionDataStream
]

instance LightLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Light level sensor for illumination measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightLevelDataStream
]

// ---------- Physical Acting Components ----------
instance DimableLEDFixture : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Dynamic dimmable LED fixture for lighting control"
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC actuator enabling heating and cooling operations"
]

instance ShadingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Shading actuator controlling blinds or shading devices"
]

// ---------- Data Transmitted ----------
instance PhotometricDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PhotometricSensor
]

instance TemperatureDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance HumidityDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]

instance MotionDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotionDetector
]

instance LightLevelDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightLevelSensor
]

instance EnergyConsumptionDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotionDetector
]

// ---------- Data ----------
instance PhotometricData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Photometric data stream received from PhotometricSensor via Eclipse Hono middleware"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReinforcementLearningEngine
    DTDFVocab:fromData PhotometricDataStream
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature data received from TemperatureSensor via Eclipse Hono middleware"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HVACControlEngine
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataStream
]

instance HumidityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Humidity data received from HumiditySensor via Eclipse Hono middleware"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HVACControlEngine
    DTDFVocab:fromData HumidityDataStream
]

instance MotionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motion data received from MotionDetector via Eclipse Hono middleware"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotionDataStream
]

instance LightLevelData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Light level data received from LightLevelSensor via Eclipse Hono middleware"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReinforcementLearningEngine
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightLevelDataStream
]

instance EnergyConsumptionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated energy consumption data derived from temperature, humidity and occupancy streams"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictiveEnergyAnalyticsService
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyConsumptionDataStream
]

// ---------- Insights ----------
instance RealTimeDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight presenting live data streams for facility monitoring"
]

instance EnergyConsumptionOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating optimal energy consumption schedules"
]

instance LightingScheduleOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing optimized lighting schedules"
]

instance DesignScenarioEvaluationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight evaluating design scenarios within the BIM environment"
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight facilitating immersive 3‑D visualization"
]

instance RuntimeDeviceModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating successful generation of runtime device models"
]

instance BIMModelValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight confirming BIM model validity"
]

// ---------- Actions ----------
instance UpdateControlPolicyAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to update HVAC and lighting control policies based on optimisation results"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustLightingScheduleAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to automatically adjust lighting schedule"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ModifyHVACPolicyAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to modify HVAC control parameters in response to environmental data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// ---------- Services ----------
instance RealTimeMonitoringDashboard : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time monitoring dashboards displaying live building data"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeDataInsight
]

instance PredictiveEnergyAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service estimating future energy consumption"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionOptimizationInsight
]

instance RLLightingOptimisationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning based lighting optimisation service"
    DTDFVocab:provides LightingScheduleOptimizationInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustLightingScheduleAction
]

instance DesignScenarioSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation service for evaluating design scenarios within the BIM model"
    DTDFVocab:provides DesignScenarioEvaluationInsight
]

instance Immersive3DVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Immersive 3‑D visualization rendered in Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides ThreeDVisualizationInsight
]

instance HVACControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "HVAC control service managing heating/cooling based on sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModifyHVACPolicyAction
]

instance DeviceModelGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service generating runtime device models through automated MDE transformations"
    DTDFVocab:provides RuntimeDeviceModelInsight
]

instance BIMModelValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service validating enriched BIM models with domain‑specific metamodels"
    DTDFVocab:provides BIMModelValidationInsight
]

// ---------- Enablers ----------
instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono middleware for real‑time sensor data transport"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringDashboard
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto digital twin platform for persisting device data"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringDashboard
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveEnergyAnalyticsService
]

instance ModelDrivenTransformationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model‑driven transformation engine for generating runtime artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:enables DeviceModelGenerationService
]

instance ReinforcementLearningEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning engine for lighting optimisation"
    DTDFVocab:enables RLLightingOptimisationService
]

instance HVACControlEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "HVAC control engine integrating heating/cooling logic"
    DTDFVocab:enables HVACControlService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 environment for immersive 3‑D visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables Immersive3DVisualizationService
]

instance DataAnalyticsEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Engine for performing predictive analytics on energy consumption data"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveEnergyAnalyticsService
]

instance AutodeskRevitBIMTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Autodesk Revit authoring tool enriching BIM with device and control metadata"
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMModelValidationService
]

instance DassaultSystèmesBIMTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dassault Systèmes BIM tool for metadata integration"
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMModelValidationService
]

instance LightingHVACMetamodel : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Domain‑specific metamodels for lighting and HVAC control"
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMModelValidationService
]

// ---------- Models ----------
instance BIMIFCModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM representation of the building using IFC schema enriched with device and control metadata"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenTransformationEngine
]

instance RuntimeDeviceModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Runtime device model generated via model-to-text transformations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HVACControlEngine
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReinforcementLearningEngine
]

instance ControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Control logic model defining automation and control policies"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HVACControlEngine
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReinforcementLearningEngine
]

instance UnrealVisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3‑D visualization model imported into Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5
]

// ---------- Environment ----------
instance BuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains BuildingTwin
]

instance BuildingTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Top‑level building twin aggregating device‑level twins"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the Digital Twin’s optimization and decision services are transmitted back to the building automation system through Eclipse Hono/Ditto, closing the loop and actuating the corresponding physical devices."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Near real‑time data ingestion and control with event rates typically within seconds, supported by Eclipse Hono’s high‑throughput message broker, enabling real‑time or sub‑second synchronization between PT and DT."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin constellation consists of a central application orchestrating device twins, middleware for message routing, and graphical engines; all components are connected through defined interfaces and extension points to enable modular service integration."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin covers the design, construction (fabrication), and operation phases of the building; however, runtime semantic extraction is performed on BIM models of the designed building and updated during operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Alignment between the virtual and physical assets is quantified using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric; runtime validation is performed by continuous streaming of sensor data and periodic conformance checks against the BIM model."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between PT and DT uses the Eclipse Hono message broker supporting MQTT, HTTP, and AMQP protocols, with data serialized in JSON and vertices communicated via Ditto’s RESTful API."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The framework is designed to exchange information with external building automation systems, sensor networks, and potentially other Digital Twins via the standardized middleware interfaces provided by Eclipse Hono and Ditto."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The development follows BIM standards (IFC), ISO 19650 for information management, and uses open‑source middleware (Hono, Ditto) that adhere to MQTT/AMQP standards; model‑driven transformations are guided by domain‑specific metamodels."
]
